purpose: Access GridMET daily gridded climate data (1979-present) over CONUS

GridMET.get_bygeom.output_type: xarray Dataset with lat/lon spatial grid
GridMET.get_bygeom.note: Returns xr.Dataset. Extract basin mean: ds['pr'].mean(dim=['lat','lon'])

gotchas: GridMET only covers CONUS (contiguous US). Fails for Alaska, Hawaii, Puerto Rico.
Temperature variables (tmmx, tmmn) are in Kelvin — always subtract 273.15.
Spatial averaging over a polygon: use .where(mask).mean() with a rasterized mask.
Large date ranges (>10 years) over large watersheds may be slow — consider chunking by year.

common_patterns.fetch_precip_temp:
from pygridmet import GridMET
import geopandas as gpd
gdf = gpd.read_file('watershed.geojson')
ds = GridMET('pr,tmmx,tmmn', dates=('2000-01-01', '2020-12-31')).get_bygeom(gdf.geometry.iloc[0])
pr = ds['pr'].mean(dim=['lat','lon']).to_pandas()
tmax_c = ds['tmmx'].mean(dim=['lat','lon']).to_pandas() - 273.15
